title: Customer Risk Rating
passage: All customers are assigned a risk rating of 1 (Low) to 5 (High) during onboarding. Customers rated 4 or 5 require annual review and enhanced transaction monitoring with lower alert thresholds.

title: Beneficial Ownership Verification
passage: For legal entities initiating transfers above $15,000, the institution must verify and document the identity of all beneficial owners holding 25% or more of the entity before processing the transaction.
